limitations: The real repo source was Factory, but the failure was intentionally injected only into the disposable copy.
Alpha-24 creates an operator handoff bundle; it still does not auto-apply to protected repositories.
commandsRun: pnpm dev external patch-trial --repo /Users/evgeny/Documents/projects/factory --mode real-repo-disposable --out /tmp/runforge-alpha24-operator-handoff/factory --run-id alpha24-operator-handoff
